metadata.name: Thread Library
metadata.description: ISO metric (coarse/fine/extra-fine, M1-M100) plus UNC/UNF/UNEF/BSP/NPT/Trapezoidal reference thread geometry.
metadata.primary_source: ISO 724 (metric thread base-profile formulas) applied to the ISO 261 standard diameter/pitch table; non-metric entries from their own named standard (ASME B1.1 / ISO 228-1 / ASME B1.20.1 / ISO 2904), NOT ISO 724.

records.notes: ISO 261 standard coarse-pitch diameter/pitch pair; pitch/minor diameter/stress area computed via the ISO 724 metric screw-thread base-profile formulas.
records.source: ISO 724 formula over ISO 261 diameter/pitch table

Reference entry for a non-ISO-metric thread series, from the referenced national/international standard (NOT ISO 724 -- ISO 724 applies only to ISO metric threads). Not independently re-verified against the primary standard text in this exercise.
